Hero.label: Digital Studio
Hero.subtitle: Turning complex ideas into simple, fast, and user-friendly products.

About.label: Our vision
About.quote: If you can dream it, we can build it.
About.body: Our approach focuses on creating personalized, human-centered, and technically excellent solutions. We believe every line of code must have a strategic purpose to drive your business forward.
About.differentiatorHeadline: Design, creativity, and problem solving — all in one team.
About.differentiatorBody: We don't just build things that look good. We combine sharp design instincts, creative thinking, and structured problem solving to craft digital products that perform as well as they look.
About.pillar1Desc: Every pixel is intentional. We create interfaces that are not only visually compelling but deeply intuitive for the people using them.
About.pillar2Desc: We approach every project with fresh eyes — no templates, no shortcuts. Each solution is crafted specifically for your product and your users.
About.pillar3Desc: We dig into the real challenge behind every brief. From architecture to UX decisions, we think clearly so the final product truly works.

Pillars.label: Why ATBA
Pillars.headline: What sets us apart.
Pillars.pillar1Desc: Every site we build starts from scratch. Your business isn't generic — your website shouldn't be either.
Pillars.pillar2Desc: We use cutting-edge technology. That means real speed, pixel-perfect design, and code that grows with your business.
Pillars.pillar3Desc: We onboard you and stay available after your site goes live.

Services.label: Services
Services.headline: What we build
Services.subtitle: These are the types of sites we develop.
Services.card1Desc: Conversion pages designed from scratch. Optimized so visitors do what you need: buy, book, contact, or subscribe.
Services.card2Desc: Informational sites, portfolios, and booking platforms built completely from scratch. Fast, scalable, and uniquely designed for your brand.
Services.card3Desc: Online stores built from scratch with a focus on shopping experience, loading speed, and design that converts.
Services.card4Desc: For businesses that already have an online presence but need a refresh. We audit what exists, redefine the visual direction, and rebuild from scratch.
Services.ctaText: Not sure which one you need?

guia.title: Dominican Gastronomic Guide
guia.description: A digital food guide celebrating Dominican culinary identity — destinations, traditional dishes, and cultural routes.

itiba.title: Itibá Gastronomic Agency
itiba.description: A culinary and cultural platform born in the Caribbean to rethink gastronomy with identity, method, and a vision for the future.

MiniNosotros.label: Who we are
MiniNosotros.title: Design and code, one team.
MiniNosotros.body: We work together from the start of every project so what gets designed is exactly what gets built. No middlemen, no lost in translation.
MiniNosotros.card1Desc: I build efficient, scalable, and well-structured solutions.
MiniNosotros.card2Desc: I design intuitive experiences that connect with people.

CTA.body: Request a free quote and tell us about your idea. We'll get back to you within 24 hours.

Testimonials.label: What our clients say
Testimonials.headline: Clients who trusted us.
Testimonials.t1Quote: Working with ATBA was an excellent experience. They understood exactly what we needed and the result exceeded our expectations.
Testimonials.t2Quote: The process was clear from start to finish. They delivered on time and communication was outstanding throughout the entire project.
Testimonials.t3Quote: Design and code working together really shows in the final product. Great experience — I'd recommend them without hesitation.

FAQ.label: FAQ
FAQ.headline: Answers to your questions.
FAQ.faq1Q: How much does a website cost?
FAQ.faq1A: Every project is different, which is why we work with custom quotes. Send us a message with your idea and we'll get back to you with a free, no-obligation quote within 24 hours.
FAQ.faq2Q: How long does the process take?
FAQ.faq2A: A standard project takes between 2 and 4 weeks from first contact to launch. Timelines depend on scope, complexity, and how quickly feedback comes in.
FAQ.faq3Q: What do I need to have ready to get started?
FAQ.faq3A: Just a clear idea of what you need. We'll guide you through everything else — copy, images, structure, and strategy. If you already have materials, great, but it's not required.
FAQ.faq4Q: Do you offer support after launch?
FAQ.faq4A: Yes. Once your site is live, we onboard you so you can manage it yourself, and we stay available for questions and adjustments during the support period.
FAQ.faq5Q: Do you work with clients outside of Argentina?
FAQ.faq5A: Yes, we work with clients across Latin America and beyond. The entire process is handled remotely, with clear communication and virtual meetings whenever needed.

Header.subtitle: From websites to complex platforms — every project is the result of understanding the business, designing with intention, and building with technical precision.

Body.heroBody: We are a studio that combines design and development to create fast, clear, and effective solutions.
Body.whoText: We are a studio that combines design and development to create fast, clear, and effective digital solutions.
Body.missionBody: To help people and businesses bring their ideas to the digital world through clear, efficient, and user-centered solutions — caring about both technical quality and visual experience.
Body.col3Text: We aspire to create digital products that not only fulfill their purpose, but generate real value, connect with people, and support the growth of those who trust us.
Body.howBody: We believe in a clear, collaborative process focused on results.
Body.step1Desc: Before designing anything, we understand your business, your audience, and your goals. This stage defines everything that follows.
Body.step2Desc: We gather references, analyze your competition, and define a visual direction that is true to your brand. Nothing comes from a template.
Body.step3Desc: We turn the design into a functional, scalable, and optimized application.
Body.step4Desc: When the site is finished, we onboard you, answer your questions, and stay available for whatever you need.
Body.differentiatorHeadline: Creativity and logic, in one team.
Body.differentiatorBody: We are a designer with creative vision and a developer with problem-solving ability. That combination means every project not only looks great — it works great. No templates. No generic solutions. We understand your problem and build from scratch, because every business is unique and its website should be too.
Body.check1: Teamwork between development and design from the start
Body.check3: Clear communication and support throughout the process
Body.teamSubheadline: Design and development — two perspectives, one product.
Body.member1Bio: I focus on building efficient, scalable, and well-structured solutions.
Body.member2Bio: I design intuitive experiences that connect with people.
